sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES platformer

special_mechanics.name: Slide
special_mechanics.description: Player ability to slide, added as new feature in Power Blade 2

special_mechanics.name: Newt Suit
special_mechanics.description: Collectible power suit allowing player to climb ceilings and walls

special_mechanics.name: Wet Suit
special_mechanics.description: Collectible power suit enabling swimming mechanics

special_mechanics.name: Rocket Suit
special_mechanics.description: Collectible power suit enabling flight capability

special_mechanics.name: Patriot Suit
special_mechanics.description: Collectible defensive power suit with additional firepower

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game described as similar to Mega Man series with added slide mechanic and four collectible power suits that modify player movement capabilities.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Power Blade 2
